display.purpose: Hero headline only; Syne 700 with slight negative tracking.

title.purpose: Card-level role and item headings in Syne 700.

body.purpose: All prose in DM Sans 400; measure 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Eyebrows and meta; DM Sans 600 uppercase, 0.15em tracking.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Standard card lift on hover, paired with translateY(-4px).

shadows.name: button-accent-rest
shadows.purpose: Soft terracotta glow grounding the primary button at rest.

shadows.name: button-accent-hover
shadows.purpose: Deeper terracotta glow on primary-button hover.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Heaviest elevation for modals and overlays.

motion.name: ease-fast
motion.purpose: Color and small state changes (links, nav, input focus).

motion.name: ease-base
motion.purpose: Default for hover lifts, card and button transitions.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Springy overshoot, used sparingly for emphasis.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal entrance (opacity + translateY 28px); staggered for lists.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid terracotta call-to-action with a warm glow; lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85rem 2rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #FFFFFF; background-color: #C2410C; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(194, 65, 12, 0.2); transition: all 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #9A3412; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(194, 65, 12, 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C2410C; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Transparent secondary action with a sand border that turns terracotta on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.85rem 2rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #292524; background-color: transparent; border: 1.5px solid #E7E0D6; border-radius: 6px; transition: all 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: #C2410C; color: #C2410C; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C2410C; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: White surface lifted off the cream page; flat at rest, shadow on hover.
components.html:
Bachelor of Fine Arts

A short supporting line describing the item.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E7E0D6; border-radius: 10px; padding: 2rem 3rem; transition: transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(28, 25, 23, 0.1); } .ds-card__title { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.15; color: #292524; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card__body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #645D57; margin: 0; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Top-nav link with a terracotta underline that grows from zero on hover/active.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #645D57; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0; width: 0; height: 1.5px; background-color: #C2410C; transition: width 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link[aria-current="true"] { color: #C2410C; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after, .ds-nav-link[aria-current="true"]::after { width: 100%; }

components.name: Experience Row
components.description: Signature editorial CV row: a two-column spread with a left meta-rail (gold timeframe eyebrow over location) and a right body (Syne role, terracotta company, prose summary), divided by a hairline rule. No card chrome; a faint warm wash on hover is the only state. The current role is a Gold Wash band with a 'Current' pill.
components.html:
March 2023 – Present
The Woodlands, TX

Director of Communications Current

The Woodlands Methodist Church

Leads digital communication and brand expression across a large multi-campus congregation, aligning teams around the website ecosystem, database, and social presence.
components.css: .ds-exp { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(170px, 210px) 1fr; gap: 2rem; padding: 3rem 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid #E7E0D6; border-radius: 10px; transition: background-color 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-exp:hover { background: rgb(184 134 11 / 0.06); } .ds-exp__aside { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-exp__period { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #8A6309; } .ds-exp__location { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6E6760; } .ds-exp__role { display: flex; align-items: baseline; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #292524; margin: 0; } .ds-exp__badge { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #745507; background: rgb(184 134 11 / 0.16); padding: 0.15em 0.65em; border-radius: 100px; } .ds-exp__company { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #C2410C; margin-top: 0.25rem; } .ds-exp__summary { max-width: 62ch; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1.0625rem; line-height: 1.65; color: #645D57; margin-top: 1rem; }

narrative.overview: A printed magazine feature about a career, rendered for the web. Warm paper stock, confident headlines, and generous prose carry a 25-year arc from graphic design to communications leadership. The personality is warm, editorial, and credible: approachable enough to feel human, composed enough to read as authority earned over decades. Nothing shouts; the work and the writing do the persuading. The accent is a single burnt terracotta against an antique-gold second, used sparingly so color reads as voice rather than decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream paper field, never stark white as the page background.
A single terracotta accent used on a small fraction of any screen, with antique gold as a quieter second.
Confident Syne display headlines paired with a humanist DM Sans body.
White cards as the unit of substance; the page beneath stays calm.
Motion supports reading and is fully optional; the page is legible with it off.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Terracotta carries the brand on ≤10% of any given screen. Gold is the only permitted second voice and stays quieter. Never add a third hue to balance them; the restraint is the identity.

rules.name: The Warm-Paper Rule
rules.body: The page background is always a warm cream or sand, never pure #FFFFFF. White is reserved for cards that need to lift off the paper.

rules.name: The Caps-for-Labels-Only Rule
rules.body: Uppercase + wide tracking is reserved for short labels and eyebrows (≤4 words) and the logo. Never set sentences or body copy in all caps.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Cards and surfaces are flat with a hairline border at rest. Shadow is a state, earned by hover, focus, or elevation, never the default look.

dos: Do keep the page background warm (Cream #FAF7F2 or Sand #F0EBE3); reserve pure white for cards.
Do spend terracotta sparingly (≤10% of a screen) and let gold play only a supporting second.
Do set headlines in Syne and body in DM Sans; this pairing is the committed identity.
Do keep prose measures at 65-75ch and use Ink (#292524) for primary reading text.
Do treat shadows as a hover/elevation state with warm espresso-tinted values, not ambient gray.
Do ship a prefers-reduced-motion fallback for every reveal and hover; content must be fully visible with motion off.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS landing page: no gradient heroes, no purple-on-white, no big-number hero-metric template, no identical icon-card grids.
Don't drift toward the corporate LinkedIn / resume-builder look: no stock photography, no default-blue palette, no point-of-view-free layouts.
Don't reach for the dark developer-terminal aesthetic: no neon-on-black, no monospace-as-costume.
Don't add flashy maximalism: parallax overload or motion that upstages the content.
Don't lighten the text tokens back toward the old #78716C / #A8A29E values; they failed AA on the sand sections. Text must clear 4.5:1 on sand (#F0EBE3), and gold text must use #8A6309, not #B8860B.

Don't use a colored border-left/border-right stripe (or a ::before bar faking one) as a card accent; mark cards with a full border, a background tint like the current-role gold wash, or a leading glyph.
